title: Where the ROI Comes From
summary: Defines the principal ROI levers for Joz's work: revenue growth, productivity, cost reduction, risk reduction, faster decisions, and improved adoption.
claims: ROI should be tied to a measurable business baseline and target, not generic AI activity.
Joz's work creates value through revenue uplift, reduced manual effort, lower delivery friction, improved adoption, reduced risk, and faster decisions.
Every proposed initiative should have a value owner, metric, baseline, target, and verification method.
proof_points: 20× digital sales growth at Maybank–Ageas Etiqa.
70% reduction in handoff friction at Publicis.
Large-scale accessibility and engineering impact at Erste.
